context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements Stripe webhook signature verification using the raw request body, handles the required event types, makes fulfillment logic idempotent, and documents local development workflow with the Stripe CLI.

checklist.name: Raw body for verification
checklist.description: Passes the raw (unparsed) request body — not a parsed JSON object — as the first argument to stripe.webhooks.constructEvent()

checklist.name: constructEvent used
checklist.description: Uses stripe.webhooks.constructEvent() to verify the incoming webhook event rather than trusting the request body directly

checklist.name: Webhook secret from env
checklist.description: Reads the webhook signing secret from process.env.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET (not hardcoded)

checklist.name: stripe-signature header
checklist.description: Reads the signature from req.headers['stripe-signature'] and passes it to constructEvent()

checklist.name: payment_intent.succeeded handled
checklist.description: Includes a handler for the 'payment_intent.succeeded' event type

checklist.name: payment_intent.payment_failed handled
checklist.description: Includes a handler for the 'payment_intent.payment_failed' event type

checklist.name: charge.refunded handled
checklist.description: Includes a handler for the 'charge.refunded' event type

checklist.name: Idempotency check
checklist.description: Fulfillment function checks whether the order has already been fulfilled (e.g., checks a status field) before executing fulfillment side-effects, and returns early if already done

checklist.name: Returns 200 on success
checklist.description: Returns a 200 JSON response (e.g., { received: true }) after successfully processing the event

checklist.name: Returns 400 on bad signature
checklist.description: Returns a 400 status code when webhook signature verification fails

checklist.name: stripe listen documented
checklist.description: README or comments document using 'stripe listen --forward-to' for local webhook testing during development
